SPARQL.Query:
PREFIX foaf: <https://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a foaf:Person } LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX sch: <http://schema.org/> PREFIX foaf: <https://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a foaf:Person } LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX sch: <http://schema.org/> PREFIX foaf: <https://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>
SELECT * WHERE { ?s a foaf:Person } LIMIT 10
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX sch: <http://schema.org/> SELECT * WHERE { ?s a sch:person } LIMIT 10
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX sch: <http://schema.org/> SELECT * WHERE { ?s ?p sch:person } LIMIT 10
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX sch: <http://schema.org/> SELECT * WHERE { ?s sch:person ?o . } LIMIT 10
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX sch: <http://schema.org/> SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s sch:person ?o . } LIMIT 10
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX sch: <http://schema.org/> SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a sch:person . } LIMIT 10
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX sch: <http://schema.org/> SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s rdf:label ?o; a sch:person . } LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s rdf:label ?o } LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?s ?p ?o WHERE { ?s rdf:label ?o } LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?s ?o WHERE { ?s rdf:label ?o } LIMIT 10

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s rdf:label ?o } LIMIT 10
SELECT * WHERE { ?s ?label ?o } LIMIT 10
